title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM 34, PAGE 95, SUBPARAGRAPH 24, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ISABELA, PARAGRAPH "A", TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-ONE HUNDRED ONE (RE PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF  ISABELA).

chunks.text:
H. No. 16623 / 65 OG No. 51, 14101 (December 22, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5678, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM 34, PAGE 95, SUBPARAGRAPH 24, FOR THE PROVINCE OF ISABELA, PARAGRAPH "A", TITLE B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-ONE HUNDRED ONE (RE PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF ISABELA).

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 34, page 95, subparagraph 24, for the Province of Isabela, paragraph "a", Title B, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Thirty-one hundred one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"34. Masigun Bridge, (Masigun Creek), Burgos consÂtruction

40,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
